name: ux-design
description: Guide, measure, and implement UX best practices. Scored usability + accessibility audits, quantitative UX metrics, and stack-adaptive scaffolding for design tokens, accessible components, interaction feedback, and UX copy.

interface.shortDescription: Guide, measure, and implement UX best practices.
interface.longDescription: UX Design brings UX best practices to Codex as skills: scored usability (Nielsen heuristics) and WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audits, quantitative measures (Core Web Vitals, SUS), and stack-adaptive scaffolding for design tokens, accessible WAI-ARIA components, interaction-feedback states, and UX copy.
defaultPrompt: Set up design tokens for this project
Walk me through this project's UX patterns
